subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Praise be to God that the breeze from the Abhá Paradise hath stirred and quickened the friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء حمد خدا را که نسیم جنت ابهی یاران را بوله و حرکت آورده و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
